endpoints.name: Elemental monkey trio (Pansage / Pansear / Panpour line)

description: Completes the card-side half of a half-wired stack edge. Simipour BB-018 already sat in the node's appears_on: list (wave-127 attach) AND already carried the characters: frontmatter pointer, but the card-side ## Connections prose bullet was missing while both sibling Black Bolt trio members (Pansage BB-004, Panpour BB-017) carry theirs. Sync-drift orphan: node side and frontmatter-pointer side present, prose-edge side absent. Wrote the missing bullet matching the established sibling-card register. Parent brief mis-stated the gap as also missing the characters: pointer; the pointer was already present (lines 52-53) -- only the ## Connections bullet was actually absent.
